owner_operator_stated: Founded 1978 by Dr. Thomas Bonuso and Dr. Terry Camacho (matches the NPI record entity name 'THOMAS C. BONUSO D.D.S., CHARLES T. CAMACHO D.D.S.'); the practice is now branded 'The Smile Standard' and headed by Dr. Toufeek Dabah, described as hand-selected by the founders as successor.
notes: Address (1061 N Salem Dr) and phone ((847) 882-8387) exactly match the NPI record via onesmilestandard.com. Practice now operates as 'The Smile Standard,' headed by Dr. Toufeek Dabah rather than the record-named Bonuso/Camacho -- framed by the site as a founder-to-successor handoff, not an unrelated takeover. Single-location, independent (no DSO/multi-location affiliation found). No careers page found on homepage, about-us, or contact pages.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Amelia Aristodemo is stated as Owner/Lead Dentist of Happy Smiles Family Dentistry.
notes: Address (21 N Roselle Rd, Schaumburg IL 60194) matches the NPI record exactly via happysmilesfamilydentistry.com. The website's listed phone (847-524-0488) differs from the record phone ((847) 310-9090); a reverse search shows (847) 310-9090 actually belongs to an unrelated practice (Renew Dental Loft) at a different address (435 S Roselle Rd), so this looks like stale/incorrect vendor phone data rather than a takeover of this address. Single-location independent practice per site (5 unnamed additional staff listed, not dentists). No careers/hiring page found on about-us, contact-us, or homepage.

owner_operator_stated: Practice name and website ('Lee and Lee Dentistry') directly correspond to the record entity 'Lee & Lee Dental Associates PC,' operated by Dr. Timothy Lee, DDS, MS and Dr. Angela Cheong-Lee, DDS.
notes: Address (829 E Schaumburg Rd) and phone ((847) 584-4494) match exactly across multiple directories (OpenCare, CareCredit, Yelp) tied to leeandleedentistry.com. Direct WebFetch of the practice's own domain failed (301 redirect loop then HTTP 503); doctor names and address/phone corroboration are drawn from indexed search-result snippets and third-party directory listings rather than a successfully loaded practice page. Doctors match the record entity name exactly (Lee & Lee, established 1993). No careers page confirmed found.

owner_operator_stated: CareCredit lists the entity as 'Lifetime Dental PLLC. DBA Vida,' with Dr. Yasir Obaidi, DDS, FAGD as principal owner -- matches the record entity name 'LIFETIME DENTAL PLLC' exactly and resolves the record's unavailable DBA field.
notes: Address (1843 W Golf Rd, Schaumburg IL 60194) and phone ((847) 807-6024, differs from record's (847) 882-3323) confirmed live on vidadentalgroup.com contact page; vendor hint 'Secure-Dental.Com' did not resolve to this practice and appears to be a generic/wrong vendor domain. Site references serving several surrounding towns (Streamwood, Hoffman Estates, Elgin, etc.) from this single physical address -- marketing/service-area language, not multiple offices. No careers/hiring page found on contact-us, new-patients, or homepage.

owner_operator_stated: Site does not name a Schaumburg-specific owner; Dr. Sung Eun (name matches record 'Eun Sung Hyun') is explicitly listed as an associate dentist at Royal Dental Care, a 7-location IL group -- the original record entity now operates under this multi-location corporate brand rather than as its own named owner.
notes: Address (1224 N Roselle Rd Ste A) and phone ((847) 999-7620, the 'new patients' line) both match the NPI record exactly via royaldentalcare.com. The address now operates under 'Royal Dental Care,' a 7-location IL dental group (Norridge, Schaumburg, Chicago, Schiller Park, Franklin Park, Streamwood, Hanover Park); Dr. Sung Eun (matches record name 'Eun Sung Hyun') is listed there as an ASSOCIATE dentist, not an owner -- the original solo-style practice appears to have been absorbed into this multi-location brand. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Bhumika Patel is described as having opened the practice in December 2014 and functions as its lead/founding dentist; the site does not reference the legal record name 'ARSA PC' anywhere.
notes: Address (219 W Golf Rd) and phone ((847) 882-3333) match the NPI record exactly via schaumburgdentalstudio.com. Site names Dr. Bhumika Patel (opened the practice Dec 2014, lead dentist) and Dr. Samer Elbatanouny (oral surgery focus); the legal record name 'ARSA PC' is not referenced on the site, consistent with the record's own unavailable-DBA flag. Single-location independent practice; no DSO/multi-location affiliation found. No careers/hiring page found on contact-us page.
